text.title: typescript-strict-mode Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for typescript-strict-mode as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using the non-null assertion chain: user!.name!.first!
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every ! silently produces a TypeError at runtime if the value is actually null; use optional chaining and nullish coalescing instead.

failure-mode.description: Casting unknown external data with "as User".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Type assertions are unchecked — invalid shapes pass at compile time but crash at runtime. Validate with a type guard or Zod instead.
